wordplay_note: A guru who walks barefoot through affluent Berkeley
card_description: Edgar Barefoot (meaning "Barefoot = unshod / humble / countercultural") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Transmigration of Timothy Archer*. Charismatic spiritual teacher and radio personality modeled on Alan Watts. Name note: A guru who walks barefoot through affluent Berkeley. The commodification of Eastern spirituality in 1960s-70s California. First appears in *The Transmigration of Timothy Archer*.

reference.brief: Charismatic spiritual teacher and radio personality modeled on Alan Watts
reference.significance: The commodification of Eastern spirituality in 1960s-70s California
